pages.title: Becoming a Vampire Maid
pages.text: There are two ways to transform a maid into a vampire:$(br2)$(li)$(bold)Monster Attack:$() Vampire monsters from the Vampirism mod can infect maids by attacking them. The maid will contract Sanguinare Vampiris, and after the infection period, she will transform into a vampire maid.$(li)$(bold)Vampire Fang:$() Use a vampire fang item on a maid to directly infect her.

pages.title: Vampire Levels
pages.text: Vampire maids have a level system from 1 to 5, each granting unique titles and attribute bonuses:$(br2)$(li)Lv.1 - Blood Servant$(li)Lv.2 - Blood Attendant$(li)Lv.3 - Dark Blood Attendant$(li)Lv.4 - Rose Blood Attendant$(li)Lv.5 - Eternal Night Bloodqueen$(br2)Higher levels provide better attribute bonuses and slower blood decay rates.
